Header.Title: Vacation Optimizer
Header.Subtitle: Maximize your time off around public holidays

SoloPlanner.MinGapDays: Min. gap between vacations (days) for auto-optimization
SoloPlanner.MinGapDaysHint: Minimum days between the end of one vacation and the start of the next
SoloPlanner.NoteText: We detect your country and fetch its public holidays to find the best vacation windows. By connecting holidays and weekends into longer breaks, you get the most time off with the fewest PTO days.
SoloPlanner.PtoBudgetHint: This is your total PTO budget for the year

Results.Title: Vacation Options
Results.Subtitle: Click an option to highlight PTO days on the calendar
Results.SubtitleMulti: Select multiple options to plan your year. Overlapping or over-budget options are disabled.
Results.NoResults: No vacation options found for the selected period and PTO days.
Results.NoResultsWeekendHolidays: Plot twist: all your public holidays fall on weekends this period. The calendar gods owe you one.
Results.MidWeekHint: {{count}} more option(s) available if you enable mid-week vacation starts.
Results.AutoOptimizeTooltip: Picks the best combination of non-overlapping vacations to maximize your days off within your PTO budget
Results.SortByRestTooltip: Sort by total consecutive days off, longest vacations first
Results.SortByEfficiencyTooltip: Sort by rest days per PTO day used, best bang for your buck first
Results.ExportCalendarTooltip: Download selected vacations as a calendar file you can import into Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar

SoloPlanner.MinimumLeaveUnavailable: Could not determine minimum leave for {{country}}. Enter your PTO manually.

Error.LoadFailed: Could not load your country and holiday information.
Error.HolidaysFailed: Could not load holidays. Please try again.
